title: School Admin — Subscription & Billing
content:
Overview


The Subscription page is where school admins manage their school's plan. It shows the current plan status, allows switching between monthly and yearly billing, and displays all available tier options with pricing.



Current Plan Status


At the top of the page, the Current Plan card shows:


  • Plan name: The school's active subscription tier (Trial, Tier 1–5, or Inactive)
  • Status: Active, Trial (with days remaining), Expiring Soon (within 14 days), or Inactive
  • Student range: The number of students covered by the current tier
  • Billing cycle: Monthly or Yearly
  • Subscription actions: Upgrade, downgrade, renew, or cancel depending on current status

During the 30-day trial period, admins see a trial banner with days remaining and a Subscribe Now button. All portals remain open during the trial.


When a subscription is active but expiring within 14 days, an expiring banner appears with a Renew button.


When a subscription is inactive (trial ended or cancelled), all non-admin users see locked portal cards on the School Hub. Admins retain access to the Admin Portal to manage billing.



Billing Toggle


Between the current plan and the tier cards, there is a Monthly / Yearly toggle switch. Flipping between them updates all tier prices in real time:


  • Monthly: Standard per-month pricing for each tier
  • Yearly: Discounted annual pricing — saves approximately 8–17% depending on the tier

A green "SAVE UP TO 17%" badge appears next to the Yearly option. The toggle is visual only — it doesn't change the subscription until the admin clicks a Subscribe or Switch button on a tier card.



Tier Cards


Five tier cards are displayed in a grid, each showing:


  • Tier number and name
  • Student range: The number of students covered (e.g., 1–50, 51–100, 101–200, 201–500, 500+)
  • Monthly price and yearly price (updates with the toggle)
  • Yearly savings: Dollar amount saved by choosing annual billing
  • Feature list: What's included at each tier

The Tier 3 (101–200 students) card is highlighted with a "MOST POPULAR" badge and gold border. All tiers include unlimited teachers, full gradebook access, and quiz monitoring. Higher tiers add priority support and dedicated account management.


A notice below the tier cards shows the recommended tier based on the school's current student count, helping admins choose the right plan.



Changing Plans


  1. Select the desired billing cycle using the Monthly/Yearly toggle
  2. Click the Subscribe or Switch button on the chosen tier card
  3. The system redirects to the Stripe billing portal to complete payment
  4. Upon successful payment, the subscription updates immediately and all portals unlock for users

Downgrading to a lower tier is possible but the school should ensure their student count fits within the new tier's range. Upgrading takes effect immediately. Yearly plans that are cancelled will continue until the end of the paid period.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can see your current plan at the top of the Subscription page — it shows your tier, student range, and billing cycle."
  • "Toggle between Monthly and Yearly to compare prices before making a change."
  • "Yearly billing saves you up to 17% — the savings amount is shown on each tier card."
  • "Your trial lasts 30 days. All features are open during that time so you can evaluate the platform."
  • "Only school admins can access the Subscription page. Teachers and students won't see it."
  • "If your subscription expires, teachers and students will see locked cards on the hub — but you'll still have admin access to renew."
